screens.name: Songs Library
screens.purpose: Show the new Die With a Smile draft inside the existing list-detail lead-sheet workspace.

ux_rules: Reuse the existing songs workspace patterns without adding new UI mechanics.
Keep provisional audio-derived uncertainty visible in the chart notes instead of hiding it.
Prefer section and system groupings that keep the long chart scannable.

screen_contexts.layout_intent: Fit a long audio-derived draft chart into the existing score viewer without inventing new chrome.
interaction_risks: Too many sections can make the draft feel fragmented.
Provisional bars must remain clearly marked.
notes: No new visual patterns were introduced.

constraints: Confine the change to the songs data source.
Do not overstate certainty for chromatic review bars.
open_decisions: A later symbolic chart can replace the provisional audio-derived measures.

critical_judgments: The new song is scannable in the existing list-detail layout.
Chart notes communicate the provisional nature of the registration.
must_not_regress: The score viewer still renders 4-measure systems cleanly.

visual_constraints: No visual UI changes were introduced; only existing content density changed.
